title: Battle result settled once
description: Ensure battle records and user result updates are written at most once per battle, even if Tick observes game-over state repeatedly.
success_criteria: Battle record writing is guarded by a one-time flag.
User result update is guarded by a one-time flag.
risk_points: Separate record and user-result flags can get out of sync.
Disconnect paths may suppress legitimate result persistence.
